descriptionTemplate:
This talent is only effective in the {Astral Reign} stages.
This Awakener's CON, ATK, and DEF +[Arg1]%, and they gain [Arg2] Keyflare upon their first {Rouse}.
{Fiamma}'s buff effects +[Arg3]%. After each turn starts and before the discard cards phase, clear all {Burn} from cards in hand. Kathigu-Ra gains 1 stack of {Combust} for each stack of {Burn} cleared.
